violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoops in ice bin were found with the handles in contact with the ice. Scoops should be stored with handles up to avoid contact with the ice.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Cooked beef and green beans were found in the walk-in cooler without date markings. Employee available did not know when they were prepared. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked so proper disposal can occur.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The insde of the microwaves were found dirty. Microwaves should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice machine backsplash was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Clean utensils were found stored in a dirty bucket during inspection. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.
